proposal.working_title: AI Consulting for Small Business Explained: How Mid-Market Operators Pick Partners Who Ship Working Agents in 90 Days
proposal.one_line_angle: Most 'AI consulting' engagements for small business end in a 30-slide strategy deck and zero shipped agents. This post walks through the 4-question vetting framework mid-market operators use to filter out PowerPoint shops and hire partners who actually ship a working agent (or three) inside 90 days, plus what good week-4, week-8, and week-12 checkpoints look like.
outline_bullets: Why Most Small-Business AI Consulting Stops at PowerPoint (and What That Costs Operators)
The 4-Question Vendor Vetting Framework: Scope, Stack, Shipping Cadence, and Skin-in-the-Game
Inside a 90-Day Engagement: What Mid-Market Operators Should See by Week 4, Week 8, and Week 12
